name: submit_coverage_summary
description: Submit a compact summary of this generation so future generations in the same chapter have real context. Always call this tool.

examplesUsed.description: Concrete Indian examples / scenarios used in the passage (e.g. 'NaCl electron transfer', 'Born-Haber cycle').

conceptsCovered.description: Key concepts explained in the passage.

approachAngle.description: One sentence describing the angle / framing used so a retry can take a different one.

questionAngles.description: Brief summary of the cognitive levels and concept angles the questions tested.
